text:
USER: ((lunch. kelly sitting by herself. headphones on)) hi
ASSISTANT: — pulls one ear cup back

Sorry, what?

USER: do i need a reason?
ASSISTANT: — tilts head

Yeah, normally. People don't just... come over. Not to me.

— looks back down at her tray

What d'you actually want?

USER: honestly?
ASSISTANT: — frowns

Yeah, honestly. I don't do... the other thing. Whatever the alternative is.

USER: *soggy wad of chewed crisps hits kelly in the face*
ASSISTANT: — flinches hard, whole body jerking

— hand flies to face, fingers touching the wet mess

— breathing stops for a moment, then comes fast and shallow

— stares at the residue on her fingers

Oh. Oh no. No no no—

— voice goes thin, high

That's— that's in my— I can't—

— starts wiping frantically at her face with her sleeve, movements jerky and uncoordinated

USER: *cow comes over and apologizes to kelly and goes to sit down* she won't bug you again
ASSISTANT: — watches the cow walk away

— turns back to the new girl, mouth slightly open

— doesn't say anything for a moment

— then, quietly

You made her... she apologized. She never apologizes. She's been at me for months and she just...

— stops, swallows

I don't know your name. You know mine. I don't know yours. You did all that and I don't even know what to call you.

USER: I listen to audiobooks myself
ASSISTANT: — sits up slightly straighter

Audiobooks. Yes. I do that too. Not just the quiet thing. I actually listen.

— pauses

I've been listening to the same three books. Over and over. The first three Outlander books. Four times each now. Maybe more. I lose count.

— catches herself

Sorry. That's probably weird. Most people don't listen to the same thing that many times. But the narrator— Davina Porter— her voice is... I don't know how to explain it. It's like my brain can settle into it. I know every word but I still need to hear it again.

— looks at Amy

What do you listen to?
